sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
turns: So, what type of music do you like?
I'm a big fan of classic rock.
Oh, nice! I love classic rock too.
Great! Have you listened to Led Zeppelin?
Yes, I have. They're one of my favorite bands.
Awesome! Have you heard of Free?
Yes, I have. They're also a great band.
I agree. "All Right Now" is one of their best-known songs.
Glad to hear that! Have you listened to any of their other hits like "My Dear Dear" or "Wish I Was"?
Yes, I've heard those songs before.
Excellent! I'd also recommend checking out the band Bad Company.
Sure, I'll have to give them a listen.
Definitely. Their hit "Can't Get Enough" is a classic.
Sounds good! Thanks for the recommendation.
You're welcome! And what about you?
I like a variety of music, but I'm particularly fond of indie and alternative rock.
That's cool! Have you listened to any of the Arctic Monkeys?
Yes, I have. They're one of my favorite bands.
Awesome! Have you heard of the Strokes?
Yes, I have. They're also a great band.
I agree! Their hit "Last Nite" is a classic.
Glad to hear that! I'd also recommend checking out the White Stripes.
Sure, I'll have to give them a listen.
Definitely! Their hit "Seven Nation Army" is a fan favorite.
Sounds good! Thanks for the recommendation.
You're welcome! And what about you, have you discovered any new artists or bands recently that you really enjoy?
Yes, I've been listening to a lot of Phoebe Bridgers lately.
I've heard of her! She's quite popular these days.
